role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (eucalyptus, scrub, soil) consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Eucalyptus globulus) and their distribution, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (asphalt, shoulders, manhole covers) and utility poles, fitting the regulatory/infrastructure scope.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design, image quality) to distinguish between similar regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence, and the tournament effectively used the botanics and regulatory distinctions to separate Portugal from Spain.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of eucalyptus, scrub, and soil match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification aligns with visual evidence.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road and pole descriptions match the image.
